This is an empty local VS Code workspace with npm workspaces already prepared.

Build only phase 1 of a monorepo for:
- Nuxt 3 + Vue + TypeScript in apps/public-site
- Next.js + React + TypeScript in apps/diagnosis-app
- shared package in packages/shared

Rules:
- npm only
- local terminal only
- SCSS
- BEM
- TypeScript
- no Docker
- no cloud setup
- no unrelated file edits
- no full page implementation yet

Before editing or running commands, show:
1. assumptions
2. current repo summary
3. files to create/update
4. commands to run
5. phase 1 plan

Then scaffold foundations only.
